__doc__: Layer 3: Chaos Analysis — stability scoring, conflict classification, severity rating
name: ChaosOS :: Layer 3 — Chaos Analysis

execution_sequence.name: CPU load stability score
execution_sequence.command: uptime | awk -F'load average:' '{print $2}' | awk -F, '{printf "load_1m=%.2f load_5m=%.2f load_15m=%.2f\n",$1,$2,$3}'

execution_sequence.name: Package manager conflict detection
execution_sequence.command: which brew apt-get pacman yum dnf apk 2>/dev/null | xargs -I{} basename {} | tr '\n' ' ' && echo ''; dpkg --audit 2>/dev/null | head -10 || echo 'NO_DPKG_CONFLICTS'

execution_sequence.name: Audio subsystem conflict (CoreAudio vs PipeWire)
execution_sequence.command: systemctl status pipewire 2>/dev/null | grep -E '(active|failed)' | head -3; pactl info 2>/dev/null | grep 'Server Name' || pulseaudio --check -v 2>&1 | head -5 || echo 'AUDIO_SYSTEM_UNKNOWN'

execution_sequence.name: Zombie process count
execution_sequence.command: ps aux | awk '$8=="Z"' | wc -l | xargs -I{} echo 'zombie_count={}'

execution_sequence.name: Generate stability score
execution_sequence.command: LOAD=$(uptime | awk -F'load average:' '{print $2}' | awk -F, '{print $1}' | tr -d ' '); CPUS=$(nproc 2>/dev/null || echo 1); SCORE=$(awk "BEGIN{s=1-($LOAD/$CPUS); if(s<0)s=0; printf \"%.2f\",s}"); echo '{"kernel_stability_score":'$SCORE',"threshold":"{{STABILITY_THRESHOLD}}","ui_coherence_rating":"'$([ $(echo "$SCORE > 0.5" | bc -l) -eq 1 ] && echo STABLE || echo NIGHTMARE)'"}'
